groups.label: expanding
groups.description: Paper-protocol expanding context, vehicle_then_aquarium direction, random ordering #3.

sentences.text: Multi-spectral camouflage netting reduces the visual and thermal signature of the tank during static defense operations.

Multi-spectral camouflage netting reduces the visual and thermal signature of the tank during static defense operations. My cousin showed me around the military base and we got to sit inside a real tank.

Multi-spectral camouflage netting reduces the visual and thermal signature of the tank during static defense operations. My cousin showed me around the military base and we got to sit inside a real tank. Modular armor kits allow field crews to reconfigure the tank protection level depending on the threat environment.

Multi-spectral camouflage netting reduces the visual and thermal signature of the tank during static defense operations. My cousin showed me around the military base and we got to sit inside a real tank. Modular armor kits allow field crews to reconfigure the tank protection level depending on the threat environment. Drone footage showed the enemy tank reversing into a building for concealment as the strike aircraft approached.

Modular armor kits allow field crews to reconfigure the tank protection level depending on the threat environment. Sandbags and razor wire surrounded the tank that served as a checkpoint along the main road.

Protein skimmers remove dissolved organic compounds before they accumulate in the reef tank water column. A bristlenose pleco attached itself to the glass near the top of the tank and refused to move. My daughter named every single fish in the tank and gets upset if we mix them up. She poured the dechlorinated water slowly into the tank so the current would not disturb the fry. Every weekend the family gathered to watch the clownfish swim circles in their living room tank. The eel slithered through a narrow PVC pipe wedged between rocks at the bottom of the tank. The pet store employee scooped a goldfish from the display tank and placed it in a bag.
